title: GroundTruthFixture
description: Schema for test_skus_ground_truth.json — the canonical fixture for OBS regression and evaluation testing. Each entry represents a known product with verified expected values for scraper validation.

sku.description: Product UPC/SKU identifier. Must be a non-empty string.

brand.description: Verified brand name (canonical form, e.g. 'Scotts' not 'ScottsMiracle-Gro').

name.description: Full product name as it appears on the official source page.

description.description: Product description from the official source. Optional but recommended.

size_metrics.description: Size/quantity string (e.g. '1.5 cu ft', '8 lb', '25 Quart'). Parsed by ground_truth_loader._parse_size_metrics().

images.description: List of product image URLs from the official source.

source.description: Comma-separated list of known sources (legacy field, superseded by expected_source_*).

expected_source_url.description: The verified official manufacturer URL for this product. Must be a valid http/https URL.

expected_source_domain.description: The expected official domain (e.g. 'scotts.com', 'mannapro.com'). Used for domain-matching assertions.

expected_source_tier.description: Source tier classification for the expected URL.

expected_fields.description: List of field names that the scraper is expected to successfully extract for this product. Used to validate extraction coverage.

difficulty.description: Extraction difficulty rating for this product. Used to stratify test results.

price.description: Known product price (optional, may be null if unavailable).
